Informatics

The Information School

Curricular options: Data Science, Health & Well-Being, Human-Computer Interaction.

This major is capacity-constrained. Completion of prerequisites does not guarantee admission.

Most students enter by submitting an additional application once enrolled at UW.

Department admission information

  • Admission is for autumn and spring quarter only.
  • Requirements must be complete by the departmental application deadline.

Courses REQUIRED for admission:

  • INFO 200 – Intellectual Foundations of Informatics1
  • One of CSE 121, CSE 122, CSE 123, or CSE 143
  • One of STAT 311 or QMETH 201

Minimum grade of 2.0 in each course.

Competitive preparation

Completion of INFO 201 before transfer is recommended.

Entering transfer information

Total undergraduates
746
Total from Washington community colleges
51

NOTES:

  1. 1 INFO 200 may be completed after transfer under the stated provision.
